He might be saying "I [saw] the werewolf" or he's just confused. But then he immediately says "Justin's the fucking werewolf" [127]. It seems he's accusing Justin.

parsed_output.justification: Justin is the most suspicious player due to his highly inconsistent claims. He first claims to be the Robber who stole from Mike and did not see a Seer, but later changes his story to say he stole from James. His admission that he was just 'stirring the pot' and his repeated contradictions regarding his night actions strongly suggest he is bluffing to hide a Werewolf or Minion role.
